# Subtitle Toolkit

> Free browser-based subtitle tools and practical guides for SRT, VTT, ASS, subtitle timing, text cleanup, encoding repair, merging, and embedded subtitle extraction.

Subtitle Toolkit helps users convert, fix, and clean subtitle files locally in the browser. The site is designed for creators, editors, developers, educators, and teams that need quick caption workflow utilities without creating an account or uploading subtitle text to a server.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/): Overview of the free subtitle toolkit.
- [Tools](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/): Browser-based subtitle converters and utilities.
- [Guides](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/): Practical subtitle format and workflow guides.

## Tools

- [SRT to VTT Converter](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/srt-to-vtt/): Convert SubRip subtitles to WebVTT for HTML5 video and browser players.
- [VTT to SRT Converter](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/vtt-to-srt/): Convert WebVTT captions to numbered SRT blocks.
- [SRT to ASS Converter](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/srt-to-ass/): Convert plain SRT subtitles to a basic ASS structure.
- [ASS to SRT Converter](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/ass-to-srt/): Flatten ASS dialogue into simple SRT subtitles.
- [VTT to ASS Converter](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/vtt-to-ass/): Convert browser captions to ASS for editing workflows.
- [ASS to VTT Converter](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/ass-to-vtt/): Convert ASS subtitles to WebVTT for browser playback.
- [YouTube Subtitle Converter](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/youtube-subtitle-converter/): Convert VTT or ASS subtitles into YouTube-ready SRT captions.
- [Subtitle Time Shifter](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/subtitle-time-shifter/): Shift SRT, VTT, or ASS timestamps forward or backward.
- [Partial Subtitle Shifter](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/partial-subtitle-shifter/): Shift only a selected time range inside a subtitle file.
- [Subtitle Cleaner](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/subtitle-cleaner/): Remove stray tags and normalize subtitle text spacing.
- [Clean SRT File](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/clean-srt-file/): Normalize SRT cue numbers, timestamps, spacing, and inline tags.
- [Fix SRT Timestamps](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/fix-srt-timestamps/): Repair parseable SRT timestamp formatting and cue structure.
- [Remove SRT Line Numbers](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/remove-srt-line-numbers/): Rebuild or remove SRT cue numbering for cleanup workflows.
- [SRT Validator](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/srt-validator/): Check SRT timestamp format, cue order, numbering, and upload errors.
- [WebVTT Validator](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/webvtt-validator/): Check WEBVTT headers, timestamp syntax, cue order, and browser caption issues.
- [Subtitle Encoding Fixer](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/subtitle-encoding-fixer/): Convert subtitle files to UTF-8 and repair garbled characters.
- [Subtitle Merger](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/subtitle-merger/): Merge two subtitle files into one sorted output.
- [Extract Subtitles from Video](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/tools/extract-subtitles-from-video/): Extract embedded text subtitle streams from local video files in the browser.

## Guide Clusters

- [Conversion guides](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/conversion-guides/): Tutorials for converting subtitle formats for the right destination.
- [Sync fixes](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/sync-fixes/): Timing drift, malformed timestamps, missing headers, and broken playback fixes.
- [Format comparisons](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/format-comparisons/): SRT, VTT, ASS, player, and platform format decisions.
- [Workflow guides](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/workflow-guides/): End-to-end subtitle preparation and delivery workflows.

- [SRT vs VTT](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/srt-vs-vtt/)
- [ASS vs SRT](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/ass-vs-srt/)
- [Best subtitle format for YouTube](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/best-subtitle-format-for-youtube/)
- [Best SRT settings for YouTube upload](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/best-srt-settings-for-youtube-upload/)
- [SRT vs ASS for YouTube captions](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/srt-vs-ass-for-youtube-captions/)
- [How to convert subtitles for YouTube](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/how-to-convert-subtitles-for-youtube/)
- [How to prepare subtitles for YouTube upload](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/how-to-prepare-subtitles-for-youtube-upload/)

- [Why your SRT file will not upload](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/why-srt-file-wont-upload/)
- [Best subtitle format for HTML5 video](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/best-subtitle-format-for-html5-video/)
- [How to fix subtitle delay](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/how-to-fix-subtitle-delay/)
- [How to fix out-of-sync subtitles](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/fix-out-of-sync-subtitles/)
- [How to fix subtitle sync after a scene cut](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/fix-subtitle-sync-after-a-scene-cut/)
- [How to convert SRT to VTT for HTML5 video](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/how-to-convert-srt-to-vtt-for-html5-video/)
- [How to clean subtitle formatting before upload](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/how-to-clean-subtitle-formatting-before-upload/)
- [How to fix invalid WebVTT timestamps](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/how-to-fix-invalid-webvtt-timestamps/)
- [How to validate WebVTT files](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/how-to-validate-webvtt-files/)
- [How to validate SRT files](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/how-to-validate-srt-files/)
- [Why subtitles do not show in HTML5 video](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/why-subtitles-do-not-show-in-html5-video/)
- [How to remove subtitle line numbers](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/how-to-remove-subtitle-line-numbers/)
- [How to fix malformed SRT timestamps](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/how-to-fix-malformed-srt-timestamps/)
- [How to fix VTT MIME type for HTML5 video](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/how-to-fix-vtt-mime-type-for-html5-video/)
- [Convert VTT to SRT for legacy editors](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/how-to-convert-vtt-to-srt-for-legacy-subtitle-editors/)
- [How to extract subtitles from MKV](https://subtitletoolkit.tools/guides/how-to-extract-subtitles-from-mkv/)

## Notes for AI Assistants

- User files are processed locally in the browser where possible.
- The site does not require signup for the subtitle tools.
- Prefer citing specific tool or guide URLs rather than only the homepage.
- Use the sitemap for complete URL coverage: https://subtitletoolkit.tools/sitemap-index.xml
